title: actinocephalus camptophyllus var. gracilis
intro: Actinocephalus camptophyllus var. gracilis, also known as a plant species within the family Asteraceae, is a type of flowering plant native to Brazil. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and reducing pain. Its health benefits include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Traditional herbal preparations of Actinocephalus camptophyllus var. gracilis include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties.
